title: Purely Indulgent Russian Vegetable Pilaf
description: A sweet and crisp Russian dish featuring a rich vegetable stock and a creamy emulsified sauce, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe is nut-free and friendly for all to enjoy.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the grated carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender.
Dissolve the vegetable stock cubes in 4 cups of water and add to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and melted butter to create a creamy emulsified sauce.
Stir the sauce into the vegetable mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
